title: You don't have to have it figured out today.
body: If today was heavy, that's allowed. If today was light, that's allowed too. You don't need a reason to rest, and you don't need permission to keep going. Whatever this day looked like for you — you're still here. That counts for something.
author: StillHereRD

title: Your mind doesn't have to be quiet for you to be okay.
body: Some nights the thoughts don't stop, and that's exhausting in a way that's hard to explain to someone who hasn't felt it. You don't have to silence your mind to deserve rest. You don't have to solve everything before you're allowed to lie down. Let the thoughts be loud if they need to be. You can still be safe underneath all that noise.
author: StillHereRD

title: Missing someone is not a problem to solve.
body: Grief doesn't move in a straight line, and it doesn't ask permission before it shows up again. If you're missing someone tonight, you don't have to explain it or make it smaller. You're allowed to carry this for as long as it takes. Loving someone that much was never going to be simple to let go of — and maybe it isn't supposed to be.
author: StillHereRD

title: Feeling unseen doesn't mean you're invisible.
body: There's a specific kind of tired that comes from feeling like no one really knows what's going on with you. That feeling is real, and it's heavy, and it doesn't mean nobody cares — sometimes it just means it's been hard to let anyone in. You don't have to perform being fine for the people around you tonight. Right here, for a few minutes, you don't have to be anything other than exactly what you are.
author: StillHereRD

title: Tired is allowed to just mean tired.
body: You don't have to turn your exhaustion into a lesson right now. It doesn't have to be about balance, or boundaries, or what you should be doing differently. Sometimes tired is just tired — the ordinary, honest kind that comes from carrying real things for a long time. You're allowed to rest without earning it first.
author: StillHereRD

title: You are allowed to be a work in progress.
body: The voice that tells you you're failing is loud sometimes, but loud doesn't mean accurate. You are not behind. You are not too much or not enough. You're a person doing a hard, ordinary, human thing — living — without a manual and without a finish line. That's not falling short. That's just what this is.
author: StillHereRD

title: No tienes que tenerlo todo resuelto hoy.
body: Si hoy fue un día pesado, está bien. Si hoy fue un día ligero, también está bien. No necesitas una razón para descansar, ni permiso para seguir adelante. Como sea que haya sido este día para ti, sigues aquí. Y eso ya cuenta.
author: StillHereRD

title: Tu mente no tiene que estar en silencio para que estés bien.
body: Hay noches en que los pensamientos no paran, y eso cansa de una forma difícil de explicar a quien no lo ha sentido. No tienes que silenciar tu mente para merecer descanso. No tienes que resolverlo todo antes de poder acostarte. Deja que los pensamientos sean ruidosos si lo necesitan ser. Aun debajo de todo ese ruido, puedes estar a salvo.
author: StillHereRD

title: Extrañar a alguien no es un problema que resolver.
body: El duelo no avanza en línea recta, y no pide permiso antes de volver a aparecer. Si esta noche extrañas a alguien, no tienes que explicarlo ni hacerlo más pequeño. Puedes cargar con esto el tiempo que haga falta. Querer tanto a alguien nunca iba a ser fácil de soltar — y tal vez no tiene por qué serlo.
author: StillHereRD

title: Sentirte invisible no significa que lo seas.
body: Existe un cansancio particular que viene de sentir que nadie sabe realmente lo que te pasa. Ese sentimiento es real, y pesa, y no significa que a nadie le importe — a veces solo significa que ha sido difícil dejar entrar a alguien. Esta noche no tienes que fingir que estás bien para quienes te rodean. Aquí, por unos minutos, no tienes que ser nada más que exactamente lo que eres.
author: StillHereRD

title: Estar cansado puede significar solamente eso: cansancio.
body: No tienes que convertir tu cansancio en una lección ahora mismo. No tiene que tratarse de equilibrio, ni de límites, ni de lo que deberías hacer diferente. A veces el cansancio es solo eso — el tipo honesto y común que viene de cargar cosas reales durante mucho tiempo. Puedes descansar sin tener que ganártelo primero.
author: StillHereRD

title: Puedes ser un trabajo en progreso.
body: La voz que te dice que estás fallando a veces es fuerte, pero fuerte no significa que tenga razón. No estás atrasado. No eres demasiado ni insuficiente. Eres una persona haciendo algo difícil, común y humano — vivir — sin manual y sin línea de meta. Eso no es quedarse corto. Es simplemente lo que es esto.
author: StillHereRD

title: You don't have to solve your entire life today.
body: Some days, simply existing is enough. You are not behind for not having clarity. Sometimes clarity arrives after rest, not before it.
author: StillHereRD

title: Not everything you feel needs an explanation.
body: Some emotions don't ask for analysis, only space. You can feel them without turning them into decisions or conclusions.
author: StillHereRD

title: You are not failing for needing a pause.
body: Rest does not interrupt your progress; it supports it. Even when it doesn't feel like it, stopping is also a form of moving forward.
author: StillHereRD

title: You don't have to be productive for today to matter.
body: Your worth is not defined by what you achieve. Some days are meant simply to be lived gently.
author: StillHereRD

title: You might not be lost, just tired.
body: And tiredness can distort everything: decisions, memories, the future. Sometimes what you need is not direction, but rest.
author: StillHereRD

title: You don't need everything under control to be safe.
body: Life will always have uncertain parts. Still, you can find moments of calm inside the mess.
author: StillHereRD

title: What you are feeling does not define who you are.
body: It is only part of this moment, not a full description of you. States change, even when they feel permanent.
author: StillHereRD

title: You don't have to carry everything at once.
body: You can hold only what belongs to today. The rest can wait without meaning you are failing.
author: StillHereRD

title: There are days when progress is invisible.
body: Just because you can't see it doesn't mean it isn't happening. Some change is quiet and internal.
author: StillHereRD

title: You don't need to convince yourself that you are okay right now.
body: You can be in the middle of the process without forcing a final version of yourself.
author: StillHereRD

title: It's okay if today feels heavier than usual.
body: Not all effort is a sign of weakness; sometimes it's a sign you are carrying a lot.
author: StillHereRD

title: You don't have to earn rest.
body: Rest is not a reward. It is a basic need, even when you feel like you haven't done enough.
author: StillHereRD

title: Not every thought that shows up is true.
body: The mind gets tired too, and sometimes it exaggerates or creates urgency where there is none.
author: StillHereRD

title: You can start again without erasing what came before.
body: You don't need to restart your life to improve it. You can continue gently from where you are.
author: StillHereRD

title: Sometimes the goal of the day is just to get through the day.
body: No big conclusions, no transformations. Just reaching the end with a little care for yourself.
author: StillHereRD

title: No tienes que resolver toda tu vida hoy.
body: Algunos días, simplemente existir es suficiente. No estás atrasado por no tener claridad. A veces la claridad llega después del descanso, no antes.
author: StillHereRD

title: No todo lo que sientes necesita una explicación.
body: Algunas emociones no piden análisis, solo espacio. Puedes sentirlas sin convertirlas en decisiones o conclusiones.
author: StillHereRD

title: No estás fallando por necesitar una pausa.
body: El descanso no interrumpe tu progreso; lo sostiene. Aunque no lo sienta así, detenerte también es una forma de avanzar.
author: StillHereRD

title: No tienes que ser productivo para que hoy importe.
body: Tu valor no está definido por lo que logras. Algunos días están hechos solo para vivirse con calma.
author: StillHereRD

title: Puede que no estés perdido, solo cansado.
body: Y el cansancio puede distorsionarlo todo: decisiones, recuerdos, el futuro. A veces lo que necesitas no es dirección, sino descanso.
author: StillHereRD

title: No necesitas tenerlo todo bajo control para estar a salvo.
body: La vida siempre tendrá partes inciertas. Aun así, puedes encontrar momentos de calma dentro del desorden.
author: StillHereRD

title: Lo que sientes no define quién eres.
body: Es solo una parte de este momento, no una descripción completa de ti. Los estados cambian, incluso cuando se sienten permanentes.
author: StillHereRD

title: No tienes que cargar con todo a la vez.
body: Puedes sostener solo lo que le corresponde a hoy. El resto puede esperar sin que signifique que estás fallando.
author: StillHereRD

title: Hay días en que el progreso es invisible.
body: Que no puedas verlo no significa que no esté pasando. Algunos cambios son silenciosos e internos.
author: StillHereRD

title: No necesitas convencerte de que estás bien ahora mismo.
body: Puedes estar en medio del proceso sin forzar una versión final de ti mismo.
author: StillHereRD

title: Está bien si hoy se siente más pesado de lo habitual.
body: No todo esfuerzo es señal de debilidad; a veces es señal de que estás cargando mucho.
author: StillHereRD

title: No tienes que ganarte el descanso.
body: El descanso no es una recompensa. Es una necesidad básica, incluso cuando sientes que no has hecho suficiente.
author: StillHereRD

title: No todo pensamiento que aparece es verdadero.
body: La mente también se cansa, y a veces exagera o crea urgencia donde no la hay.
author: StillHereRD

title: Puedes empezar de nuevo sin borrar lo que vino antes.
body: No necesitas reiniciar tu vida para mejorarla. Puedes continuar con calma desde donde estás.
author: StillHereRD

title: A veces la meta del día es solo llegar al final del día.
body: Sin grandes conclusiones, sin transformaciones. Solo llegar al final con un poco de cuidado hacia ti mismo.
author: StillHereRD
